description_long: This is a full-sized acoustic guitar with a glossy black finish and cream binding outlining the body and neck. The body features a single cutaway on the treble side, allowing easier access to the higher frets. The soundhole is round and bordered by a decorative rosette, and the bridge is a standard acoustic style with visible bridge pins. The neck is long and slender, with dot inlays marking the fretboard positions, and the headstock is fitted with six tuning pegs arranged three on each side. The back of the guitar is also black and unadorned, with the cream binding continuing around the edges. The overall construction suggests a wooden body and neck, with metal hardware for the strings and tuners.
description: A glossy black acoustic guitar with cream binding, a single cutaway, and a round soundhole. It features a wooden body, six strings, and a standard headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black body, cream binding, round soundhole, bridge, fretboard with dot inlays, and headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's thickness, the cutaway contour, and the layered construction of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back, cream binding, and the back of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body depth and the smooth, continuous finish of the guitar's side.
attribute_headstock_design: Standard acoustic shape with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, and a simple contour.
